flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New York University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.4k → $38.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at New York University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.5k → $62.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New York University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
